name: Global Uniques
uniques: Requires establishing embassies to conduct advanced diplomacy
unitUniques: No defensive terrain bonus <in [Romania] tiles> <for [non-[Romania]] units>
[This Unit] gains [15] XP <upon entering a Golden Age> <for [Persia] Civilizations>

civilopediaText.text: Global uniques are ruleset-wide modifiers that apply to all civilizations.
